\tkzKiviatDiagramFromFile[
        scale=1,
        label distance=.5cm,
        gap     = 1,label space=1.5,  
        lattice = 4]{Figures/tableae.dat}

                       mark size  = 4pt,
                       fill       = mh7!90]{Figures/tableae.dat}{1}

                       color      = mh4,
                       mark size  = 4pt,
                       fill       = mh4!40]{Figures/tableae.dat}{2} 
\tkzKiviatLineFromFile[thick,
                       color      = mh1,
                       mark size  = 4pt,
                       fill       = mh1!30]{Figures/tableae.dat}{3}
